title: rubus stans
intro: Rubus stans, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Tibetan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The medicinal properties of Rubus stans have been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Tibetan and Chinese herbalism, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus stans include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Rubus stans can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder for use in various herbal preparations.
